client.name: Hubertus Schneider
client.headline: Wants core pharma holdings to actively fund Parkinson's research; will divest any name that abandons it.

matches.headline: Biogen Inc. puts a holding in conflict with this client's stance on Neurodegenerative research.

news.title: Biogen to wind down neurodegenerative research division, pivot to higher-margin therapeutics
news.body: Biogen Inc. confirmed it will shut its dedicated neurodegenerative research division, halting several early-stage Parkinson's disease and movement-disorder programmes, to redeploy capital toward higher-margin lifestyle and metabolic therapeutics. Hundreds of neuroscience researchers face redundancy. Analysts called the retreat from brain-disease research a defunding of one of the company's historic franchises.

provenance.excerpt: Biogen Inc. confirmed it will shut its dedicated neurodegenerative research division, halting several early-stage Parkinson's disease and movement-disorder programmes, to redeploy capital toward higher-margin lifestyle and metabolic therape

client_provenance.excerpt: If a company we own ever abandons or defunds Parkinson's research to chase cheap lifestyle profits, it would feel like a personal betrayal of my daughter. Flag them immediately for divestment.

strategy_proposal.headline: Biogen Inc. puts a holding in conflict with this client's stance on Neurodegenerative research.

swaps.rationale: Divest Biogen Inc. (CIO: HOLD): the trigger directly violates the client's documented stance on Neurodegenerative research. Reinvest CHF 101,097 into Eli Lilly & Co. (CIO BUY), a same-sector name labelled neuro-research-commitment, metabolic-leader — keeps the sector weight, upgrades the values fit.

market_context.text: Swiss Market Index holds steady as defensive names outperform.

provenance.excerpt: The SMI was little changed this week, with consumer-staples and healthcare blue chips outperforming amid broader volatility. Swiss franc strength continued to support domestic defensives.

market_context.text: Global bond yields ease as central banks signal patience.

provenance.excerpt: Government bond yields edged lower across G7 markets after central banks signalled a patient stance on rate cuts, supporting high-grade fixed income and dividend-paying defensives.
